system.flavor: You send a prayer to the multicolored titan, spinning the wheel of chance.
system.effect:
Effect the effect die, then gain one of the following effects:
• 1 yourself and end your turn.
• 2 a burst (2) self area effect. Foes in the area take 1d6+4 damage (save for half) and are pushed 1.
• 3 characters in range 1-2 are teleported 1d3 spaces to a space of their choice.
• 4 characters in range 1-2 are blinded.
• 5 the positions of all characters in range 1-2, in any order.
• 6 a prior effect, then this action becomes quick, refunding its action cost.
Weave this ability resolves, roll the above effect again.

(Weave you use a weave effect, you gain the effect immediately, and then may repeat a copy of it as part of the very next ability you use. If multiple weave effects trigger, you can choose the order. Copies of a weave effect cannot weave further.)
